text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 126 

PRVDR_STATE_CD_DFRNT_IND 

LABEL: Provider Location State Differs from Submitting State Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable compares the SUBMTG_STATE_CD to the PRVDR_STATE_CD when the SRVC_LCTN_IND is 
set to 1 (indicating it is a provider service location). This flag indicates when the two state codes are 
different. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_STATE_CD_DFRNT_IND 

LONG
